name: provenance manifest validator emits a structured json record for downstream tooling consumption
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && printf '{"commit":"abc"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-consumption-schema.sh" --manifest .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json --emit json --out result.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"valid"' result.json && grep -q '"commit":"abc"' result.json && echo ok 1>&2
